zh.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor於大約1535年出生在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯。他於大約1560年與Elizabeth Pepill在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年4月在英國武斯特斯爾阿爾維其享年75歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾阿爾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor于大约1535年出生在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯。他于大约1560年与Elizabeth Pepill在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾維沙安结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年4月在英国武斯特斯爾阿爾維其享年75岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾阿爾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Taylor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: occupational name for a tailor, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English taillour ‘tailor’ (Old French tailleor, tailleur; Late Latin taliator, from taliare ‘to cut’). The surname is extremely common in Britain and Ireland. In North America, it has absorbed equivalents from other languages, many of which are also common among Ashkenazic Jews, for example German Schneider and Hungarian Szabo . It is also very common among African Americans.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Terrien   ‘owner of a farmland’ or of its altered forms, such as   Therrien   and   Terrian  .

variants.name: Tayloe
meanings: Altered form of English, Scottish, and Irish   Taylor  .

variants.name: Schneider
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Franz, Erwin, Fritz, Dieter, Manfred, Heinz, Alois, Ewald, Helmut.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, literally ‘cutter’, from Middle High German snīder, German Schneider, Yiddish shnayder. The same term was sometimes used to denote a woodcutter. This surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Hungary, Poland, and Czechia. In Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is also established in Slavicized forms (see 2 below). In part, Schneider is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare Sneider 1, Snider 1, and Snyder 1.
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Šnajdr or Šnajder, and Czech Šneidr, Šneider, Šnejdr, and Šnejder, surnames of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Tailor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Pravin, Dilip, Mahesh, Sanjay, Kanchan, Kaushik, Manilal, Mohanlal, Navnit, Shailesh, Ajay, Alpana.
Indian (Gujarat and Mumbai): mainly Parsi occupational name from the English word tailor.

nameMeanings.name: Guye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Gae , used in preference to the now obsolete spelling Gay , which was generally a girl's name, but has also been borne by men, in Ireland, as a pet form of Gabriel .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor was born about 1535, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. He married Elizabeth Pepill about 1560, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in April 1609, in Alvechurch, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Alvechurch, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor est né environ 1535, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pepill environ 1560, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1609, à Alvechurch, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Alvechurch, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor wurde um 1535 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England geboren. Er hat um 1560 in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Pepill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im April 1609 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Alvechurch, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Alvechurch, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor è nato il circa 1535 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pepill circa 1560, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1609, nel Alvechurch, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Alvechurch, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Guye Taylorは約1535年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた。約1560年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムでElizabeth Pepillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年4月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアアルベチャーチで75歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアアルベチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor(은)는 대략 1535년 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 Elizabeth Pepill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 4월 영국 워스스터실르 앨베c후르치에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 앨베c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pepill aproximadamente 1560, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1609, em Alvechurch, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Alvechurch, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor родился около 1535 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pepill около 1560 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер апрель 1609 г. в местности алвечурч, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности алвечурч, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Guye Taylor nació aproximadamente 1535, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Elizabeth Pepill aproximadamente 1560, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1609, en Alvechurch, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Alvechurch, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
